texto: Unless the distant goals of meaning, greatness, and destiny are addressed, we can’t make an intelligent decision about what to do tomorrow morning—much less set strategy for a company or for a human life. Nothing is more practical than for people to deepen themselves. The more you understand the human condition, the more effective you are as a businessperson. Human depth makes (even) business sense.
explicacao: Citação de Peter Koestenbaum sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Unless the distant goals of meaning, greatness, and destiny are addressed, we can’t make an intel…” articula reflexao, greatness, human-sense em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como bom-dia e human-sense.
